model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT
toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS t,
avg(Sum) AS avg_disk_used_percent
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'CWAgent'
AND MetricName = 'CWAgent/disk_used_percent'
AND Attributes['Dimensions.AutoScalingGroupName'] = 'Infra-ECS-Cluster-internalprod-finmo-949544de-ECSAutoScalingGroup-faSHjEK1lP68'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.path'] = '/'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t DESC

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT if (countIf(low_memory_condition OR high_swap_condition) >=2 , 1, 0) as alert_state
FROM(
  SELECT 
  toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AS t,
  
  avgIf(Sum, MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory') AS freeable_memory_bytes,
  
  maxIf(Sum, MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/SwapUsage') AS swap_usage_bytes,
  
  if(freeable_memory_bytes < 10737418240, 1, 0) AS low_memory_condition,
  
  if( swap_usage_bytes > 4294967296, 1, 0) AS high_swap_condition

  FROM $table
  WHERE $timeFilter
    AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
    AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
    AND MetricName IN ('AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory', 'AWS/RDS/SwapUsage')
    AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
  GROUP BY t
  ORDER BY t DESC
  LIMIT 3
)

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
if(countIf(max_transaction_ids > 250000000) >= 2, 1, 0) AS alert_state
FROM (
  SELECT 
      toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) as t ,
      max(Sum) AS max_transaction_ids
  FROM $table
  WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
    AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
    AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
    AND MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/MaximumUsedTransactionIDs'
    AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
  GROUP BY t
  ORDER BY t DESC
  LIMIT 3
)

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS time,
avg(Sum) AS free_storage_space
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
  AND MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time DESC

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
$timeSeries AS t,
sum(Count) AS onextel_400_requests
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'Bakasura'
  AND MetricName = 'Bakasura/Requests'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.HTTPStatusCode'] = '400'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.Provider'] = 'onextel'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
t, 
if(
    (if(exotel_q > 1 AND exotel_200 < 1, 1, 0) + if(onextel_q > 1 AND onextel_200 < 1, 1, 0)) > 1
    AND (toHour(t) + toMinute(t)/60.0 + 5.5 BETWEEN 8 AND 19),
    1, 0
) AS alert_state
FROM (
  SELECT 
      sumIf(Count, Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/SQS' 
            AND MetricName = 'AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent'
            AND Attributes['Dimensions.QueueName'] = 'app-bakasura-exotel-queue') AS exotel_q,
      sumIf(Count, Attributes['Namespace'] = 'Bakasura' 
            AND MetricName = 'Bakasura/Requests'
            AND Attributes['Dimensions.HTTPStatusCode'] = '200'
            AND Attributes['Dimensions.Provider'] = 'exotel') AS exotel_200,
      sumIf(Count, Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/SQS'
            AND MetricName = 'AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent' 
            AND Attributes['Dimensions.QueueName'] = 'app-bakasura-onextel-queue') AS onextel_q,
      sumIf(Count, Attributes['Namespace'] = 'Bakasura'
            AND MetricName = 'Bakasura/Requests'
            AND Attributes['Dimensions.HTTPStatusCode'] = '200'
            AND Attributes['Dimensions.Provider'] = 'onextel') AS onextel_200,
      toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, Interval 5 MINUTE) AS t
  FROM $table
  WHERE $timeFilter
    AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
    AND (
        (Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/SQS' AND MetricName = 'AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent') OR
        (Attributes['Namespace'] = 'Bakasura' AND MetricName = 'Bakasura/Requests')
    )
  GROUP BY t
  ORDER BY t DESC
)

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
t, 
if(
    (avg_ready / if(avg_total < 1, 1, avg_total) >= 0.98) 
    AND ((toHour(t) + 6) % 24 < 9),
    1, 
    0
) AS alert_state
FROM (
  SELECT 
      avgIf(Count, MetricName = 'AWS/AmazonMQ/MessageReadyCount') AS avg_ready,
      avgIf(Count, MetricName = 'AWS/AmazonMQ/MessageCount') AS avg_total,
      any(TimeUnix) AS t
  FROM $table
  WHERE $timeFilter
    AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
    AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/AmazonMQ'
    AND MetricName IN ('AWS/AmazonMQ/MessageReadyCount', 'AWS/AmazonMQ/MessageCount')
    AND Attributes['Dimensions.Broker'] = 'app-finmo-rabbitmq'
    AND Attributes['Dimensions.VirtualHost'] = '/'
    AND Attributes['Dimensions.Queue'] = 'ivr_tasks'
)

annotations.description:
Alert 
any one of the fargate or ec2 service is down please check it once

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
t,
if(
    (coalesce(webhook_ec2 + webhook, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(api_ec2 + api, 0) > 0) AND
    (coalesce(beat_ec2 + beat, 0) > 0 AND 
     coalesce(longday + night, 0) > 0 AND 
     coalesce(day + night, 0) > 0),
    0, 1
)   
AS alert_state

FROM (
  SELECT 
     toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix , INTERVAL 2 MINUTE) as t,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-webhooks-appvpc-ec2') AS webhook_ec2,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-webhooks-appvpc') AS webhook,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-api-appvpc-ec2') AS api_ec2,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-api-appvpc') AS api,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-beat-appvpc-ec2') AS beat_ec2,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-beat-appvpc') AS beat,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-longdayworker-appvpc-ec2') AS longday,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-night-worker-appvpc-ec2') AS night,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-dayworker-appvpc-ec2') AS day
  FROM $table
  WHERE $timeFilter
    AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
    AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'app-finmo-devops'
    AND MetricName = 'app-finmo-devops/ecs_running_count'
  GROUP BY t
  ORDER BY t
)
model.rawQuery:
/* grafana dashboard=$__dashboard, user=$__user */
SELECT 
t,
if(
    (coalesce(webhook_ec2 + webhook, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(api_ec2 + api, 0) > 0) AND
    (coalesce(beat_ec2 + beat, 0) > 0 AND 
     coalesce(longday + night, 0) > 0 AND 
     coalesce(day + night, 0) > 0),
    0, 1
)   
AS alert_state

FROM (
  SELECT 
     toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix , INTERVAL 2 MINUTE) as t,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-webhooks-appvpc-ec2') AS webhook_ec2,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-webhooks-appvpc') AS webhook,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-api-appvpc-ec2') AS api_ec2,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-api-appvpc') AS api,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-beat-appvpc-ec2') AS beat_ec2,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-beat-appvpc') AS beat,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-longdayworker-appvpc-ec2') AS longday,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-night-worker-appvpc-ec2') AS night,
      avgIf(Count, Attributes['Dimensions.service_name'] = 'app-finmo-dayworker-appvpc-ec2') AS day
  FROM dpd0.otel_metrics_summary
  WHERE TimeUnix >= toDateTime64(1757971077,3) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime64(1757971377,3)
    AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
    AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'app-finmo-devops'
    AND MetricName = 'app-finmo-devops/ecs_running_count'
  GROUP BY t
  ORDER BY t
)

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
if(
    countIf(karix_601_count > 1000) >= 3,  
    1, 
    0
) AS alarm_state
FROM (
SELECT 
    toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS t,
    sum(Count) AS karix_601_count
FROM $table
WHERE  $timeFilter 
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
  AND MetricName = 'app-finmo-devops/OutboundRequestTime'  
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'app-finmo-devops'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.OutboundAPI'] = 'karix_trigger_call'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.Method'] = 'GET'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.StatusCode'] = '601'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t DESC
LIMIT 3
)
model.rawQuery:
/* grafana dashboard=$__dashboard, user=$__user */
SELECT 
if(
    countIf(karix_601_count > 1000) >= 3,  
    1, 
    0
) AS alarm_state
FROM (
SELECT 
    toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS t,
    sum(Count) AS karix_601_count
FROM dpd0.otel_metrics_summary
WHERE  TimeUnix >= toDateTime64(1757971077,3) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime64(1757971377,3) 
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
  AND MetricName = 'app-finmo-devops/OutboundRequestTime'  
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'app-finmo-devops'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.OutboundAPI'] = 'karix_trigger_call'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.Method'] = 'GET'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.StatusCode'] = '601'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t DESC
LIMIT 3
)

rules.title: App-Finmo Exotel Karix Errors And Limits

annotations.description: CPU utilization exceed\nThis alert triggers when the database CPU utilization exceeds 50%

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
IF(
countIf(cpu_utilization > 50 ) >=3, 1, 0) as alert_state
FROM (SELECT 
toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS t,
avg(Sum) AS cpu_utilization
FROM $table
WHERE  $timeFilter
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'  
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
  AND MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
GROUP BY t
)
model.rawQuery:
SELECT 
IF(
countIf(cpu_utilization > 50 ) >=3, 1, 0) as alert_state
FROM (SELECT 
toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS t,
avg(Count) AS cpu_utilization
FROM $table
WHERE  $timeFilter
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'  
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
  AND MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
GROUP BY t
)

model.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
model.query:
SELECT 
toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) AS t,
avg(Sum) AS cpu_utilization
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
  AND MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t DESC
LIMIT 2
model.rawQuery:
SELECT 
toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) AS t,
avg(Count) AS cpu_utilization
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND ServiceName = 'awsfirehose/metrics'
  AND Attributes['Namespace'] = 'AWS/RDS'
  AND MetricName = 'AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization'
  AND Attributes['Dimensions.DBInstanceIdentifier'] = 'app-finmo-db'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t DESC
LIMIT 2
